title: agrostis howellii
intro: Agrostis howellii, also known as Howell's bent grass, is a type of grass species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrostis howellii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Agrostis howellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
